title: Daily Light on the Daily Path
author: Jonathan Bagster
tradition_notes: Daily Light is a compilation of King James Bible verses arranged topically for morning and evening reading, with no original commentary. It was prepared by Jonathan Bagster and other members of his family and became one of the most widely used daily devotional books in evangelical Christianity. The text is entirely Scripture.
source_edition: CrossWire SWORD module v1.0 (2002-01-01), from Bagster Family Bible Publishers
notes: Original compilers died 1872 (Jonathan Bagster) -- text is public domain in all jurisdictions. The underlying KJV Bible text is also public domain. Each entry contains both morning and evening readings for one day. 366 entries (including Feb 29 leap year reading). The devotional contains only Scripture quotations -- no original commentary.
